Fields.Name: Automatic Foot Effect SFX Identifier
Fields.Description: The identifier used for the SFX ID of the automatic foot effect. It corresponds to ZZZ of XYYZZZ.

Fields.Name: Precision Shoot - Player Model Fade Time
Fields.Description: The fade time when hiding the player during precision shooting. The unit is seconds

Fields.Name: Toughness Recovery Correction
Fields.Description: A correction value used to calculate the player's toughness recovery time.

Fields.Name: Base Memory Slot Count
Fields.Description: Magic memory slot initial value

Fields.Name: Base Talisman Slot Count
Fields.Description: Talisman equipment slot initial value

Fields.Name: Base Item Slot Count
Fields.Description: The default number of item slots a player has.

Fields.Name: Max Item Slot Count
Fields.Description: The max number of item slots a player can have.

Fields.Name: Item Pick-up - Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID when picking up a drop item

Fields.Name: Player Resist Recovery - Sleep
Fields.Description: Player resistance value recovery amount_sleep point / s

Fields.Name: Flare Overwrite Homing Angle
Fields.Description: Flare overwrite guidance performance deg / s (-1 no overwrite)

Fields.Name: Flare Overwrite Homing Stop Range
Fields.Description: Flare overwrite guidance stop distance m (-1 no overwrite)

Fields.Name: Sleep Collector Item Pick-up - Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID when acquiring Nemuri item

Fields.Name: Weapon Affinity Unlock - Base Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Weapon attribute ban event flag base ID

Fields.Name: Great Rune Activation - SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect Id to call when a large rune is activated from the system

Fields.Name: Insufficient Stats - Attack Power Reduction
Fields.Description: Insufficient status Basic attack power reduction

Fields.Name: Insufficient Stats - Stamina Consumption
Fields.Description: Insufficient status Stamina consumption ratio

Fields.Name: Insufficient Stats - Stamina Damage Reduction
Fields.Description: Insufficient status Playing attack power

Fields.Name: Guard Boost Correction - Max Value
Fields.Description: Maximum status value to increase performance used when calculating the status correction value of shield performance

Fields.Name: Weapon Affinity Unlock - Event Flag Step Offset
Fields.Description: How much space is left for each weapon attribute ID from the base ID. Weapon attribute ban event flag ID = Weapon attribute ban event flag base ID + Weapon attribute ID x Weapon attribute ban event flag number of steps

Fields.Name: Retribution Magic - Damage Trigger Count
Fields.Description: Causal Retribution_Number of Damages Before Counterattack

Fields.Name: Retribution Magic - Damage Trigger Duration
Fields.Description: Causal response_Number of damages until counterattack Duration s

Fields.Name: Retribution Magic - Explosion Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Causal Retribution_Counterattack Magic Damipoli ID

Fields.Name: Retribution Magic - Explosion Magic Param ID
Fields.Description: Causal Retribution_Counterattack Magic Param ID

Fields.Name: Mounted Precision Shoot - Camera Offset Height
Fields.Description: Riding precision shooting camera offset height

Fields.Name: Quiver Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Quiver adsorption Damipoly ID

Fields.Name: Bolt Case Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Bolt cylinder adsorption Damipoly ID (However, if the bolt cylinder is used alone, the quiver Damipoly ID is used)

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Flask Reduction
Fields.Description: Multi-time client bottle correction magnification (0.5 specified to halve the number of possessions)

Fields.Name: Kick Acceptance Angle
Fields.Description: Angle at which a kick can be taken when viewed from the front of the player

Fields.Name: NPC Player - Weight Rate Light
Fields.Description: Analog weight ratio for NPC players %. lightweight.

Fields.Name: NPC Player - Weight Rate Normal
Fields.Description: Analog weight ratio for NPC players %. Medium weight.

Fields.Name: NPC Player - Weight Rate Heavy
Fields.Description: Analog weight ratio for NPC players %. weight.

Fields.Name: NPC Player - Weight Rate Encumbered
Fields.Description: Analog weight ratio for NPC players %. Overweight.

Fields.Name: NPC Player - Weight Rate Ninja
Fields.Description: Analog weight ratio for NPC players %. Super lightweight.

Fields.Name: Game Clear - Base SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Criteria ID for special effects applied for lap correction

Fields.Name: Ammunition Model ID Offset
Fields.Description: Offset added to the model ID when equipped in slot 1 when displaying the arrow and bolt models. (Model Id + offset value)

Fields.Name: Ammunition Count Model Mask Threshold 1
Fields.Description: When displaying the arrow and bolt models, the one-step judgment value % of the threshold value when applying the display mask by the number. (If it is more than this value, it is displayed in one step)

Fields.Name: Ammunition Count Model Mask Threshold 2
Fields.Description: Two-step judgment value % of the threshold value when applying a display mask based on the number of arrows and bolt models. (If it is more than this value, it is displayed in 2 steps)

Attack param that triggers Ironeye's marking effect.
Seems to be only when used by the player.

Trance Attack Boost Buff Threshold 1

Fields.Name: Trance Remove Buff Effect ID - Threshold 2
Fields.Description: The additional remove effect triggered after exceeding Threshold 2, at the end of the trance duration.
